Video.summary: In "The Family", Ed is going on an out-of-town trip...but Eunice and Mickey want to come along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ross Martin & Martha Raye guest! Martha & Carol play mismatched jurors, and Ross is in "Storefront Hospital."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Ross Martin

Video.summary: Sammy Davis, Jr. stars as a flamboyant galley slave, then appears before the Queen & King as a debt collector.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones guest. Pat and Carol play competing actresses. Plus: "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Jack Jones

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball is in hot water with his wife. Then, a nervous woman finds her spouse pushing her buttons.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jim Nabors is like Caine in "Kung Fu" in a spoof of the David Carradine TV series, here entitled "Yung Fool."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tim & Harvey are generals at the signing of a peace treaty, while "The Family" gathers for Mae's funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby appear in "Science Fiction Playhouse." "Carol & Sis" features Carol intoxicated.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Carol offers a trio of guests: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Vincent Price and Eydie Gorme star. Features an encounter on an elevator & the movie spoof "House Of Terror."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing "A Star Is Born." Also, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure.
Video.title: Glen Campbell

Video.summary: Guest star Soupy Sales plays a hospital patient, and joins Carol for the movie spoof "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Soupy Sales, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Gloria Loring star. Loring spoofs "Valley Of The Dolls." Sales and Carol play newlyweds.
Video.title: Gloria Loring, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars as a husband who is visited by the water department. Mrs. Wiggins and Mr. Tudball celebrate.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell guest stars! He plays a member of "The Family." Also: movie spoof "The Lady Heir."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Pat Paulsen star. Pat looks at "How To Be A Sensuous Female" and Cass joins 10th Avenue.
Video.title: Cass Elliot, Pat Paulsen

Video.summary: Spoofs of classic movies abound, including "Ninotchka", "Blackboard Jungle", "Gone With The Wind", and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Madeline Kahn appears in the latest sketch with "The Family".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Madeline Kahn

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Tim Conway star! Steve plays a talk show host, then solves a mystery in a spoof with Tim.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays the director of a play put on by the P.T.A., and a hitman hired to kill Carol's husband.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Guest Robert Goulet joins Q&A. Sketches include the aftermath of a party, and a maid entranced by a star.
Video.title: Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry performs "Mack The Knife", then joins Carol, Harvey, and Trini Lopez in a musical melodrama.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Trini Lopez

Video.summary: Guests Mama Cass Elliot and Ken Berry offer up some musical numbers and a series of commercial parodies.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays an unsuccessful comic. Also: commercial spoofs; Tim at war, attempting to fire a cannon.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: David Hartman & Paula Kelly star! Features Nora Desmond and George and Zelda. Also: "This Is Your Lifetime."
Video.title: David Hartman, Paula Kelly

Video.summary: Bob Newhart appears in "Carol & Sis" as Roger's accountant. Also: a hungover Harvey gets a bigger headache.
Video.title: Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as Tim's girlfriend in a sketch where he is honored with a ship. And, a spoof of "Jaws."
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Carol introduces the actors who dub voices for Spanish audiences, using a classic "Carol & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Pat Carroll guest. Tim plays Lone Ranger & a man who lives a dog's life. Pat joins "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray guest. Featuring commercial parodies and the movie "The Lavender Pimpernel."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in "As The Stomach Turns", and Lyle causes havoc and absurdity.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Tim Conway star. Features spoof "The Dater's Game", and Tim as a service station attendant.
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Alan King stars as a psychiatrist. Also: Carol tries making breakfast; a nurse & patient recognize each other.
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Dom DeLuise is Carol's guest for a night of sketched, including a murder investigation and "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Shirley Jones star. Carol is under a spell and Shirley joins "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Shirley Jones, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball tries to implement a fire safety program. Also: an oasis might be salvation for Harvey & Tim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol Channing & Steve Lawrence guest. Features "As The Stomach Turns", & "Carol & Sis" in a nudist colony.
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Telly Savalas guests! Telly and Harvey play businessmen. Also: TV commercials, and Telly as "Poopi Le Moko."
Video.title: Telly Savalas

Video.summary: Peter Lawford guests. Sketches include an evening with "Carol & Sis", and Lawford wooing his mail order bride.
Video.title: Peter Lawford

Video.summary: John Byner & Petula Clark star. TV commercial spoofs and the firing of Donald Duck are on tap tonight.
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: The Family steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Step back in time with "The Family" as Eunice thinks back to her early days. Also, Tim plays a palace guard.
Video.title: Family Show
